required_skills: Risk Management and Business Continuity Planning
preferred_skills: Lean Six Sigma Black Belt Practices
responsibilities: Lead daily operational activities across departments to ensure service delivery, productivity targets, and business objectives are consistently achieved.
Develop operational strategies and execution plans that improve efficiency, scalability, and long-term organizational performance.
Manage operational budgets, resource allocation, and workforce planning activities to optimize costs and maximize productivity outcomes.
Implement continuous improvement programs using Lean Six Sigma methodologies to eliminate waste and enhance process effectiveness.
Collaborate with senior leadership to define operational KPIs, monitor performance trends, and drive strategic business initiatives.
Oversee risk management processes and contingency planning efforts to minimize disruptions and maintain operational resilience.
Develop and mentor high-performing teams by establishing performance expectations, coaching programs, and professional development opportunities.
Monitor operational dashboards and management reports to identify improvement opportunities and support data-driven decision-making.
